title: Omnia Modded SE4
description: Get ready for Omnia Modded Season 4! It's been a good while but we're finally back (and on a MC version higher than 1.12.2 no less). Join us and be a part of the story unfolding on this season's dedicated server (hosted in the US this time around!)
body:
# Omnia Modded SE4 is here!

Get ready for Omnia Modded Season 4! It's been a good while but we're finally back (and on a MC version higher than 1.12.2 no less). Join us and be a part of the story unfolding on this season's dedicated server (hosted from the US this time around!). 

# What's it about?

The modpack aims to be a nice blend of tech and magic mods, as we try to do with every season. This time around Create & Ad Astra take center stage on the tech side with Ars Nouveau and Mahou Tsukai on the magic side.

Omnia Modded is a seasonal event we like to hold in our Discord community [The Omnia League](https://join.theomnialeague.com). Every modded season we'll spin up a new, usually handcrafted, modpack and put it on a server. Seasons usually last around a month.

The modded server doesn't impose many rules just that:
- you behave in chat (aka follow our Discord rules)
- aren't hacking
- don't build anything really obscene
 
This means that players are pretty much free to do anything they want in-game. Team-up, go solo, declare war, raid someone's base, build a giant replica of the Tokyo Tower... it's all up to you!
